debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
let s := { n : ℕ+ | ∃ k : ℕ, n.val = 2 ^ (2 ^ k) }
  refine ⟨s, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp [s, Set.Infinite]
    exact Nat.exists_infinite_pow_two_pow
  · intro a ha b hb h
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := ha
    obtain ⟨l, rfl⟩ := hb
    simp [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_eq_left_iff_dvd]
    intro d hd
    have hk : d.Coprime (2 ^ (2 ^ k)) := by
      apply Nat.Coprime.pow_left
      exact Nat.coprime_two_odd (odd_iff.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) hd))
    have hl : d.Coprime (2 ^ (2 ^ l)) := by
      apply Nat.Coprime.pow_left
      exact Nat.coprime_two_odd (odd_iff.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) hd))
    have := Nat.dvd_antisymm (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.pow_dvd_pow _ (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_of_lt h))) hd)
    contradiction

a b : ℕ+
hb : b ∈ s
